## Testing Instructions
<!-- DEFAULT Local hosting test -->
1. Run MySQL in XAMPP.
2. In the `backend` directory, run `npm run db:push` to sync database tables.
3. In the `backend` directory, run `npm run dev` to start the backend on port 3001.
4. In the `app` directory, run `npm run dev` to start the frontend on port 5173.
5. Create a new layer in the UI and verify that it persists and updates in XAMPP (phpMyAdmin).
